g.title: failure_paths
g.text: XMR-WOW Atomic Swap: Failure and Refund Paths
What happens when the swap fails at each stage

g.title: timing
g.text: Why WOW lock must be longer than XMR lock
Bob locks WOW first (Step 4), so his refund
window must expire AFTER Alice has time to:
If WOW refund expired first, Bob could refund
WOW while Alice still has XMR locked = theft

g.title: atomicity
g.text: Each party creates a pre-sig adapted by the
other's public key. To complete the sig, you
must know the adaptor secret (private key).
If Alice claims WOW, her sweep TX reveals k_a.
Bob can always extract k_a from the chain.
Neither party can claim without the other learning.
